name: gadugy-mvp
description: Gadugy MVP: a private matching community for values-driven LA homeschool families.

scripts.check:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
html=Path('index.html').read_text()
assert '<title>Gadugy' in html
assert 'gadugy.com' in html
assert 'Cherokee word meaning people banding together' in html
assert all(x in html for x in ['id="landing"','id="intake"','id="profile"','id="matches"','id="detail"','id="messages"'])
assert 'property="og:title"' in html
assert 'name="twitter:card"' in html
assert 'rel="icon"' in html
assert 'data-analytics' in html
assert 'id="early-access-form"' in html
assert 'handleEarlyAccessSubmit' in html
assert 'id="privacy"' in html and 'id="guidelines"' in html
assert 'No child names are required or shown publicly by default.' in html
print('Gadugy static checks passed')
PY
